message:
Command `
LIBPID=956480
ORPID=956540

echo "=== LibreLane process state ==="
cat /proc/$LIBPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"
echo "syscall:"
cat /proc/$LIBPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD stuck on write ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS)"
echo "syscall:"
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe status ==="
# Check pipe:3207830 - how many bytes buffered?
# /proc/net/unix won't help for anonymous pipes
# But we can check if both ends are still open
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ | grep "3207830"
ls -la /proc/$ORPID/fd/ | grep "3207830"

echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane FD list ==="
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^total"
` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
LIBPID=956480
ORPID=956540

echo "=== LibreLane process state ==="
cat /proc/$LIBPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"
echo "syscall:"
cat /proc/$LIBPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD stuck on write ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS)"
echo "syscall:"
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe status ==="
# Check pipe:3207830 - how many bytes buffered?
# /proc/net/unix won't help for anonymous pipes
# But we can check if both ends are still open
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ | grep "3207830"
ls -la /proc/$ORPID/fd/ | grep "3207830"

echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane FD list ==="
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^total"
